LCC-HS9-L4-300650-HSSCILIFE-STP-CFI-01 • HS Life Science 9–10 • DNA, Proteins, and Specialized Cells

The Indigo Pitch

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is the main thing the students are trying to figure out?
2QUESTION 2: Why does the boy suggest starting with the batik cloth?
3QUESTION 3: What do the students agree their pitch should show?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Write three things: what the students are trying to do in their pitch, what the boy says they should lead with and why, and what they agree both the plant and the craft are doing.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  HS-LS1-1  |  HS Science: Life Science
